title: Maximum Number of Jumps to Reach the Last Index
titleCn: 达到末尾下标所需的最大跳跃次数

testcases.input: nums = [1,3,6,4,1,2], target = 2 Output: 3 Explanation: To go from index 0 to index n - 1 with the maximum number of jumps, you can perform the following jumping sequence: - Jump from index 0 to index 1. - Jump from index 1 to index 3. - Jump from index 3 to index 5. It can be proven that there is no other jumping sequence that goes from 0 to n - 1 with more than 3 jumps. Hence, the answer is 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: To go from index 0 to index n - 1 with the maximum number of jumps, you can perform the following jumping sequence: - Jump from index 0 to index 1. - Jump from index 1 to index 3. - Jump from index 3 to index 5. It can be proven that there is no other jumping sequence that goes from 0 to n - 1 with more than 3 jumps. Hence, the answer is 3.

It can be proven that there is no other jumping sequence that goes from 0 to n - 1 with more than 5 jumps. Hence, the answer is 5.

It can be proven that there is no other jumping sequence that goes from 0 to n - 1 with more than 5 jumps. Hence, the answer is 5.
